title: Penalty for violation of Sub-part
doc_html:
§181.  Penalty for violation of Sub-part

Whoever violates any provision of this Sub-part for which a punishment has not otherwise been provided shall be fined not less than twenty-five dollars nor more than one hundred dollars, or imprisoned for not more than thirty days, or both.
doc_text:
§181.  Penalty for violation of Sub-part
Whoever violates any provision of this Sub-part for which a punishment has not otherwise been provided shall be fined not less than twenty-five dollars nor more than one hundred dollars, or imprisoned for not more than thirty days, or both.
